prompt: Add confetti falling from the top of the page to enhance the celebratory theme of the sale.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a Shutterfly mobile screenshot featuring a '40% off EVERYTHING' sale banner. Add colorful, digitally rendered confetti falling from the very top edge of the screen, distributed across its full width, to enhance the celebratory and festive theme of the sale.
objects: Colorful, digitally rendered confetti falling from the very top edge of the screen, distributed across its full width
Mobile phone status bar (with carrier, time, battery)
Shutterfly app/page header (orange bar with Shutterfly logo, search icon, shopping cart icon)
Product imagery on the sale banner (e.g., potted plants, books, woven basket)
Sale details text ("Code: FRIENDSFAM", "Ends Sun, June 19")
Product category list (e.g., "Cards & Stationery", "Prints", "Home Decor", "Personalized Gifts")
